'''Callonia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. The [[GX1 short hauler/Legends|GX1 Short Hauler]], ''[[Long Shot]]'', originally belonging to an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]], was stolen by [[Reekeene's Roughnecks]] at Callonia's [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]].
